title: DN9 3DU, Freeland Horticulture Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/EB3208HK/V002
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Freeland Horticulture Limited Installation name: Wroot Road Composting Facility Permit number: EPR/EB3208HK/V002  "
